case_title: GOLDEN STATE LUMBER, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. RAFAEL BARAJAS VARGAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN STATE LUMBER, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SIERRA POINT LUMBER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS, RAFAEL BARAJAS AKA RAFAEL BARAJAS INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS R.B. CONSTRUCTION, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP $2,889.47 PRINCIPAL, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $173.36 INTEREST, $349.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,836.83, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN STATE LUMBER, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SIERRA POINT LUMBER AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, RAFAEL BARAJAS AKA RAFAEL BARAJAS INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS R.B. CONSTRUCTION, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2019
